title: SPBR-Farmer's Delight
description: PBR support has been provided for the Farmer's Delight mod
body:
This pack adds normals, parallax, reflection, luminescence, and subsurface scattering to Farmer's Delight according to LabPBR standards.
Please read the [SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr)![Subsurface scattering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0c48cc66929977ed015a1ae3c45c5517f656017.jpeg) precautions before using this pack; Suggest using it together with [SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr)![Normal, Reflection, and Parallax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/546cd1bd3681068871cdc0d59fd1383bedd327d2_0.webp)![Subsurface scattering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c8cf51f42ed3f465b376c2c0c32b94decfe3ac8_0.webp)![Remake the model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d19a61b89a607ce55869860c82b1110b48381e0.jpeg)![Normal and Parallax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a6c5c8a703c23104052cbdfe35eef21cea4560a.jpeg)![Normal and Parallax](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8110e06119c17413ed21ed1b7e8a460aa7c1fd5c.jpeg)
